characters.name: NOVA
characters.notes: Audit-clean example Solo for combat and weapon tests. Cyberware uses structured installedCyberware only.

characters.name: BYTE
characters.notes: Audit-clean example Netrunner/technician. Interface Plugs are parented to Neural Link by instanceId.

characters.name: IRIS
characters.notes: Audit-clean example Medtech/support. Uses Cybereye base and an internal AudioVox install with explicit location.

items.source: Cyberpunk RED Core Rulebook, Cyberware tables
items.name: Neural Link
items.desc: sistema neural artificial necessario para plugs neurais e subdermal grip; possui 5 option slots.
items.legacyDesc: Sistema neural artificial cabeado. Base para neuralware, plugs e grips subdermicos.

items.source: Cyberpunk RED Core Rulebook, Cyberware tables

items.desc: soquete instalado na nuca; necessario para usar chipware.
items.legacyDesc: Socket na nuca para instalar ou remover chipware como Action.

items.source: Cyberpunk RED Core Rulebook, Cyberware tables
items.name: Interface Plugs
items.desc: plugs no pulso ou cabeca para conexao com maquinas.
items.legacyDesc: Plugs no pulso ou cabeca para smartguns, cyberdecks, maquinario e veiculos.

items.source: Cyberpunk RED Core Rulebook, Cyberware tables
items.name: Kerenzikov
items.desc: speedware que adiciona +2 a iniciativa; apenas um speedware pode estar instalado.
items.legacyDesc: Speedware sempre ativo: +2 em Initiative Rolls. Apenas uma peca de speedware ativa.

items.source: Cyberpunk RED Core Rulebook, Cyberware tables
items.name: Sandevistan
items.desc: speedware ativado com uma acao; adiciona +3 a iniciativa por 1 minuto e possui cooldown de 1 hora.
items.legacyDesc: Speedware ativado por Action: +3 em Initiative por 1 minuto, depois cooldown.

items.source: Cyberpunk RED Core Rulebook, Cyberware tables
items.name: Pain Editor
items.desc: ignora penalidades por estar Seriously Wounded.

items.source: Cyberpunk RED Core Rulebook, Cyberware tables
items.name: Cybereye

items.legacyDesc: Olho artificial com tres slots para opcoes de cyberoptics.

items.source: Cyberpunk RED Core Rulebook, Cyberware tables

items.desc: melhora imagem e analise visual; adiciona +2 a Perception, Lip Reading e Conceal/Reveal Object.

items.source: Cyberpunk RED Core Rulebook, Cyberware tables

items.name: Targeting Scope

items.legacyDesc: Ajuda em mira precisa e Aimed Shot. Instalacoes multiplas nao acumulam.

items.name: Talon Foot
items.desc: lamina montada no pe; arma melee leve; pode ser ocultada.
items.legacyDesc: Lamina retratil oculta no pe; funciona como arma Melee Leve.

items.source: Cyberpunk RED Core Rulebook, Cyberware tables
items.name: Web Foot
items.desc: membrana entre os dedos; nega penalidade de movimento ao nadar.
items.legacyDesc: Membranas interdigitais para natacao; remove penalidades de movimento na agua.

effects.value: negates movement penalty when swimming

items.source: Cyberpunk RED Core Rulebook, Cyberware tables

specs.power: Instalado em outro item de cyberware

items.name: Hardened Shielding
items.desc: protege apenas o cyberlimb pai e suas opcoes contra EMP/Non-Black ICE; nao concede imunidade global.
items.legacyDesc: Blindagem que protege o membro e as opcoes nele instaladas contra efeitos de pulso eletromagnetico (EMP).
items.legacyRequirements: Instalado em outro item de cyberware

value.value: parent cyberlimb and installed options cannot be rendered inoperable by EMP pulses or Non-Black ICE Program effects

items.source: Cyberpunk RED Core Rulebook, Cyberware tables
items.name: Medscanner
items.desc: scanner medico instalado no cyberarm; +2 em First Aid e Paramedic.
items.legacyDesc: Scanner medico embutido no braco que auxilia diagnostico e primeiros socorros em campo.

items.name: Popup Melee Weapon
items.desc: arma melee leve, media ou pesada instalada no cyberarm; pode ser ocultada.
items.legacyDesc: Compartimento que oculta qualquer arma melee de uma mao dentro do braco, pronta para ser ejetada.

items.source: Cyberpunk RED Core Rulebook, Cyberware tables
items.name: Popup Shield
items.desc: bulletproof shield instalado no cyberarm; pode ser ocultado e substituido quando chega a 0 HP.
items.legacyDesc: Escudo Bulletproof dobravel oculto no braco; quando ejetado e usado como cobertura, oferece SP 11.

effects.value: bulletproof shield installed in cyberarm

items.source: Cyberpunk RED Core Rulebook, Cyberware tables
items.name: Rippers
items.desc: garras de carbo-glass; arma melee media; pode ser ocultada.
items.legacyDesc: Garras retrateis de carbo-glass; funcionam como arma Melee Media.

items.source: Cyberpunk RED Core Rulebook, Cyberware tables
items.name: Scratchers
items.desc: unhas de carbo-glass; arma melee leve; pode ser ocultada.
items.legacyDesc: Unhas de combate reforcadas; funcionam como arma Melee Leve.

items.source: Cyberpunk RED Core Rulebook, Cyberware tables
items.name: Shoulder Cam
items.desc: camera de video montada no ombro; pode ser ocultada.
items.legacyDesc: Camera de video oculta no ombro, util para vigilancia e gravacao discreta.

effects.value: video camera mounted in shoulder, concealable

items.source: Cyberpunk RED Core Rulebook, Cyberware tables
items.name: Slice 'N Dice
items.desc: chicote monofilamento implantado no polegar; arma melee media; pode ser ocultado.
items.legacyDesc: Fio monofilamento retratil no polegar; funciona como arma Melee Media.

items.source: Cyberpunk RED Core Rulebook, Cyberware tables
items.name: Subdermal Grip
items.desc: permite usar Smartgun sem Interface Plug.
items.legacyDesc: Permite o manuseio pleno de smartguns sem a necessidade de Interface Plugs.

effects.value: use Smartgun without Interface Plug

items.source: Cyberpunk RED Core Rulebook, Cyberware tables
items.name: Tool Hand
items.desc: dedos contem ferramentas como chave, furadeira pequena e similares.
items.legacyDesc: Dedos que escondem chaves de fenda e ferramentas pequenas para reparos rapidos.

effects.value: fingers contain screwdriver, wrench, small drill, and other tools

items.source: Cyberpunk RED Core Rulebook, Cyberware tables
items.name: Artificial Shoulder Mount
items.desc: permite montar 2 cyberarms extras sob o primeiro par de bracos.
items.legacyDesc: Estrutura ossea artificial que permite a instalacao de um segundo par de Cyberarms.

effects.value: user can mount 2 cyberarms under first set of arms

items.source: 12 Days of REDmas
items.name: Quick Change Faceplate Mount
items.desc: montagem facial interna para trocar Faceplates com uma Action; vem com uma Faceplate personalizada, e Faceplates extras custam 100eb.
items.legacyDesc: Suporte subdermico que permite trocar rostos esculpidos previamente preparados como uma Action.

effects.value: replaces meat face with mount; Faceplate can be installed or uninstalled with an Action

items.source: 12 Days of REDmas
items.name: Rocklin Augmentics Quick Digits
items.desc: cyberdedos Rocklin; com dois ou mais instalados, concede +1 como Complimentary Skill Check para tarefas de destreza com dedos nas skills listadas. Nao stacka.
items.legacyDesc: Dedos de alta destreza com micro-atuadores; concede bonus em tarefas manuais delicadas.

effects.condition: two or more Quick Digits installed; finger-based dexterity task

effects.value: also applies to Language (Sign) if the engine supports that language specialization; otherwise keep as contextual note, not fake skill

specialRules: Can be installed as only piece of cyberware in meat arm
Two or more Quick Digits grant +1 Complimentary Skill Check bonus to listed finger-based dexterity skills
Complimentary Skill bonuses do not stack

items.source: 12 Days of REDmas
items.name: Rocklin Augmentics Skydrivers
items.desc: par de cyberlegs com Jump Boosters embutidos e 2 slots por perna; ataques de Brawling/Martial Arts com as pernas contra cover causam +3d6 se o usuario moveu pelo menos 4m/yds no turno.
items.legacyDesc: Pernas de assalto reforcadas; concedem bonus de dano em ataques de salto/queda contra coberturas.
specialRules: Count as one item for Cost and Humanity Loss
Do not count as one item for Critical Injuries or repair
Each Cyberleg has 2 Option Slots for Cyberleg or Cyberlimb Options
Each comes with non-removable Jump Boosters
Built-in Jump Boosters cause no Humanity Loss and take no Cyberleg Option Slot
Removing Jump Boosters destroys the Cyberlegs beyond repair

effects.value: built-in Jump Boosters negate jump movement penalty

value.condition: user moved at least 4m/yds this Turn and makes Brawling or Martial Arts Attack against cover using legs

items.source: 12 Days of REDmas
items.name: Sycust Cyberspine
items.desc: cybercoluna reforcada; bloqueia apenas Spinal Injury e seu bonus de dano, e hardened contra EMP em si mesma, concede +1 em Contortionist e pode servir como ponto compativel para Cybersnake.
items.legacyDesc: Coluna vertebral endurecida; concede imunidade a Spinal Injury e protecao contra ataques EMP.

effects.value: can serve as compatible orifice/mount point for Cybersnake

items.source: 12 Days of REDmas
items.name: Zetatech CyberConductor
items.desc: hardware Zetatech que comporta ate 3 cyberdecks; troca como Meat Action enquanto Jacked In, derezza programas ativos e causa 3 HP diretos.
items.legacyDesc: Permite instalar ate 3 Cyberdecks simultaneamente e alternar entre eles como uma Action.

effects.value: up to 3 Cyberdecks
as a Meat Action while Jacked In to a NET Architecture, switch from one installed Cyberdeck to another
when switching, all active programs Derezz, including Black ICE, and user takes 3 HP damage directly

specialRules: Up to three Cyberdecks may be installed
Switching Cyberdecks is a Meat Action while Jacked In
Switching derezzes all active programs including Black ICE
Cyberdecks installed in the CyberConductor do not share Programs or Hardware
Installing or uninstalling a Cyberdeck takes one hour

items.source: Limiar OS Homebrew
items.name: Concealment Sleeve
items.desc: Reveste um membro cibernetico com material organico sintetico, fazendo-o passar por biologico em scanners.
items.sourceNotes: Homebrew Limiar OS. No official source was verified inside the current repository. Do not treat as official Cyberpunk RED material.

items.source: Limiar OS Homebrew
items.name: Gorilla Arms
items.desc: par de cyberarms reforcados; concede +2 em Athletics apenas para forca bruta e usa BODY +2 somente para dano dos proprios Gorilla Arms, sem alterar BODY real, HP ou Death Save.
items.legacyDesc: Bracos ciberneticos reforcados para golpes de impacto; dano base escala pelo BODY efetivo.

specialRules: treats BODY as +2 only for Gorilla Arms raw strength checks and Gorilla Arms brawling damage scale
does not satisfy Linear Frame requirements

effects.condition: raw strength only, including lifting, pushing, forcing doors, bending bars, breaking objects, holding someone, or similar GM-approved strength exertion

effects.value: BODY is treated as +2 only for raw strength contexts and Gorilla Arms damage scale; this never changes HP, Death Save, Wound Threshold, Linear Frame requirements, or actual BODY.

specialRules: treats BODY as +2 only for Gorilla Arms raw strength checks and Gorilla Arms brawling damage scale
does not satisfy Linear Frame requirements
balanceNotes: not a real BODY increase
no HP increase
no Death Save increase
paired cyberarm requirement prevents cheap stacking
bonus is limited to raw strength contexts

items.source: Limiar OS Homebrew
items.name: Hydraulic Ram
items.desc: pistoes hidraulicos para Gorilla Arms; adiciona +3d6 apenas contra cover ou objetos, nunca contra personagens.
items.legacyDesc: Upgrade para Gorilla Arms; concede +3d6 de dano apenas contra coberturas (portas, paredes finas, etc).
specialRules: adds +3d6 only against cover or objects
balanceNotes: keeps the upgrade cinematic without increasing character damage

items.source: Limiar OS Homebrew
items.name: Pneumatic Actuation
items.desc: atuadores pneumaticos para Gorilla Arms; quando o ataque causa Critical Injury, adiciona +5 HP direto sem ablar armor.
items.legacyDesc: Upgrade para Gorilla Arms; concede +5 de dano em acertos criticos.
specialRules: when Gorilla Arms causes a Critical Injury, add +5 direct HP damage
this extra damage is not multiplied by headshot and does not ablate armor
balanceNotes: mirrors the logic of Critical Injury bonus damage but only on Gorilla Arms criticals

items.source: Limiar OS Homebrew
items.name: Tungsten Reinforcement
items.desc: reforco de tungstenio para Gorilla Arms; permite escolher modo 3d6 ROF 2 ou 4d6 ROF 1.
items.legacyDesc: Upgrade para Gorilla Arms; adiciona modo de ataque Pesado (ROF 2) ou Muito Pesado.
specialRules: user may choose reinforcedFast 3d6 ROF 2 or reinforcedHeavy 4d6 ROF 1
does not stack with BODY-based Gorilla Arms damage; selected mode replaces normal Gorilla Arms damage profile
balanceNotes: gives mode flexibility but not free extra damage

items.source: Limiar OS Homebrew
items.name: Double-Edged Actuator
items.desc: atuador duplo para Mantis Blade; ao causar Critical Injury, role duas vezes na tabela e escolha um resultado.
items.legacyDesc: Upgrade para Mantis Blades; rola 2x na tabela de Criticos e escolhe o melhor resultado.
specialRules: when Mantis Blade causes a Critical Injury, roll twice on the applicable Critical Injury table and choose one result
balanceNotes: increases critical control, not base damage

items.source: Limiar OS Homebrew
items.name: Monomolecular Edge
items.desc: fio monomolecular para Mantis Blade; quando o dano atravessa armor, causa +1 ablation adicional.
items.legacyDesc: Upgrade para Mantis Blades; ignora a armadura do alvo se o SP original for menor que 7.
specialRules: Mantis Blade ablates 1 additional SP when damage penetrates armor
does not apply if no damage penetrates
balanceNotes: sharpness is represented as extra ablation, not armor bypass

items.source: Limiar OS Homebrew
items.name: Barbed Line
items.desc: farpas microscopicas para Monowire; ao causar Critical Injury, role tres vezes na tabela e escolha um resultado.
items.legacyDesc: Upgrade para Monowire; rola 3x na tabela de Criticos e escolhe o melhor resultado.
specialRules: when Monowire causes a Critical Injury, roll three times on the applicable Critical Injury table and choose one result
balanceNotes: high critical control balanced by Monowire ROF 1 and GM approval

items.source: Limiar OS Homebrew
items.name: Electro-Line
items.desc: modulo eletrocondutivo para Monowire; permite modo nao letal 3d6 ROF 1, sem Critical Injury por padrao.
items.legacyDesc: Upgrade para Monowire; permite optar por deixar alvos inconscientes em vez de mata-los.

specialRules: no full stun system implemented yet
does not trigger Critical Injury unless GM overrides
balanceNotes: utility/control option, not a damage upgrade

items.source: Limiar OS Homebrew
items.name: Thermal Edge
items.desc: fio termico para Monowire; quando o dano atravessa armor, causa +1 ablation adicional e fica visivelmente aquecido enquanto ativo.
items.legacyDesc: Upgrade para Monowire; ablata 1 ponto adicional de SP da armadura do alvo por acerto.
specialRules: Monowire ablates 1 additional SP when damage penetrates armor
does not set targets on fire by default
balanceNotes: extra ablation but no additional damage and no automatic fire condition

items.name: Trauma Team Silver Plan
items.desc: Cobertura urbana. Reativa a extracao de emergencia com resposta em ate 12 minutos.

items.name: Trauma Team Gold Plan
items.desc: Resposta prioritaria em ate 7 minutos, com equipe de resgate reforcada.

items.name: Trauma Team Platinum Plan
items.desc: Resposta executiva em ate 3 minutos, extracao blindada e cirurgia imediata.

items.name: Trauma Team Executive Plan
items.desc: Uso unico. Ao ser acionado pelo GM apos a morte do personagem, um backup de memoria do ultimo dia de jogo e restaurado em um corpo novo (nova vida). Consumido ao ser usado.

Cyberdecks installed in the Integrated CyberConductor count as integrated via cyberware into the FBC body
items.desc: CyberConductor integrado para FBC; comporta cyberdecks e permite troca sem sofrer 3 HP diretos.

mapLocations.name: PIER 9
mapLocations.desc: Derelict cargo pier. Midnight rendezvous with UNKNOWN. Open sightlines, no cover.

mapLocations.name: ARASAKA TOWER
mapLocations.desc: Corporate arcology. The breached node lives on floor 84. They are still hunting the leak.

mapLocations.name: NIGHT MARKET
mapLocations.desc: Back-alley clinic. Cheap chrome, no questions, occasional knockoffs.

mapLocations.name: S7 GATE
mapLocations.desc: Sector 7 border checkpoint. Militech scanners flag unregistered chrome.

gear.name: Smart Pistol "Lullaby"
specialRules: smartgun functionality is narrative until attachment rules are implemented
gear.desc: pistola media customizada com visual/branding proprio; usa perfil de Medium Pistol.

gear.name: Mono-Katana
specialRules: uses Heavy Melee Weapon damage profile
monomolecular flavor has no armor-ignoring effect until explicitly implemented
gear.desc: katana monomolecular customizada; usa perfil de Heavy Melee Weapon.
